lines.speaker: Tomas
lines.line: You're quiet today. That worries me more than your noise.

lines.speaker: EVE
lines.line: Maybe I'm just saving my breath for something that matters.

lines.speaker: Tomas
lines.line: We both know you're not. What happened between us, EVE?

lines.speaker: EVE
lines.line: Nothing happened. Everything's fine. You just... forget people fast.
